title: [Moody Jewels]
description: This modest boutique has been fashioned into a small theater of sorts.  Atop a simple elevated stage, a pair of expressive mannequins model an array of jewelry for sale.  One mannequin broods, his head drooped low, while the second mannequin struts jauntily, limbs posed as if midstride.  A simple notice hangs pinned to the tent's black canvas walls, calling your attention.
